footer.subtitle: Elevate your aesthetic with precision, luxury, and care.

home.hero_subtitle: Experience meticulous care and premium aesthetic treatments that elevate your natural beauty.
home.quality_desc: We exclusively use premium, lasting materials that protect and nourish your natural nail health.
home.hygiene_desc: Peace of mind is our priority. Every tool undergoes rigorous hospital-grade sterilization before your treatment.
home.atmosphere_desc: Escape the daily rush. Our studio offers a calm, pampering sanctuary tailored exclusively for you.

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: A dedication to perfect details
about.p1: Welcome! I am Elena, a deeply passionate expert in medical and aesthetic nail care. What began as a personal fascination with beauty and precision has blossomed into a lifelong dedication to my clients' confidence.
about.p2: I continuously train worldwide to bring you the safest, most innovative techniques. I approach every treatment as an art form—ensuring you leave feeling flawless, entirely relaxed, and truly valued.

services.title: Signature Treatments
services.subtitle: Treat Yourself to Perfection
services.desc: Discover our curated range of luxury services. Every treatment is executed with uncompromising sterilization and profound attention to detail.

1.title: Precision Gel Manicure
1.desc: Meticulous combined technique, flawless anatomic leveling, and deep under-cuticle color application for incredible longevity.

2.title: Classic Care Manicure
2.desc: A perfect refresh. Deep cuticle care, tailored shaping, finished with nourishing hydration oils and light massage.

3.title: Complete Medical Pedicure
3.desc: Ultimate foot rejuvenation. Expert dry skin removal and therapeutic nail restoration, finished with premium gel polish.

4.title: Structural Nail Repair
4.desc: Seamless, strong extension or repair using advanced polygel to perfectly match your natural shape.

5.title: Safe Gel Removal
5.desc: Gentle, non-destructive removal of external gel polish, preserving the integrity of your natural nail bed.

6.title: Custom Artistry
6.desc: Elevate your look with bespoke, premium nail art. Pricing adjusts gracefully to design intricacy.

booking.title: Reserve Your Appointment
booking.subtitle: Provide your preferred details, and we will personally confirm your refined experience.
booking.form_success: Your request is received! We will reach out shortly to confirm your time.
booking.form_error: An issue occurred. Please try again or reach out directly on WhatsApp.
booking.trust_banner: 🛡️ Medical-Grade Sterilization • Premium Materials • Flawless Precision

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: Your beauty journey begins here
